explanation: This command matches the Sigma rule by using IEExec.exe with a URL starting with https://, which is detected by the rule's CommandLine|contains condition.
This command matches the Sigma rule by using IEExec.exe with a URL starting with http://, which is detected by the rule's CommandLine|contains condition.
This command adds a flag (-url) to simulate a variation in command-line syntax while still including the https:// URL, which is detected by the Sigma rule.
This command uses an extended-length path prefix (\\?\) to bypass simple string-based detection while still containing the https:// URL, which is detected by the Sigma rule.
This command appends an output redirection to suppress output, but the presence of IEExec.exe and the https:// URL still triggers the Sigma rule.
